note: Mathlib/GroupTheory/Coxeter/Matrix.lean:69 -- structure CoxeterMatrix (B : Type*) where ... symmetric matrix of naturals, diagonal 1, off-diagonal ≠ 1; file docstring cites Baez's 'Coxeter and Dynkin Diagrams' and states this is the standard alternate (matrix) encoding of the same data a Coxeter-Dynkin diagram carries (edge labels m_ij). Mathlib has the matrix encoding, not a graph/diagram structure -- related, not exact.

Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/CliffordAlgebra/SpinGroup.lean:293 -- def spinGroup (Q : QuadraticForm R M) : Submonoid (CliffordAlgebra Q), defined as infimum of pinGroup and CliffordAlgebra.even. This formalizes the Spin group itself, not a representation of it (no spinor/half-spin representation construction found) -- nearby but a distinct object from 'spin representation'.

Mathlib/RingTheory/Ideal/Cotangent.lean:299 -- abbrev CotangentSpace : Type _ := (maximalIdeal R).Cotangent, docstring 'The A ⧸ I-vector space I ⧸ I ^ 2' for R a local ring with maximal ideal I -- the algebraic/scheme-theoretic (m/m²) cotangent space at a point, which generalizes the differential-geometric dual-of-tangent-space definition to arbitrary local rings; Mathlib has no smooth-manifold CotangentSpace/CotangentBundle (only TangentSpace exists there).
